content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed market with Nifty -0.25%, Bank Nifty weak (-1.09%), PSU Banks dumping (-2%), but power/energy/pharma showing relative strength. Book is 45% deployed with multiple positions near SL — focus is position management not new entries. Performance context (14% win rate, 0.4 profit factor over 5 days) demands extra discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23990,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +5.8% with strong Q4 catalyst. Trail SL from 1025 to 1030 (just below today's intraday low 1041 area, but allowing volatility). Tighten without choking — locks in ~4.7% gain even if reversed. Stock has run hard from 780 to 1041 in <4 weeks; tighten to protect profit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%, SL at 119 still ~3.3% below CMP. Gold consolidating after rally; geopolitical floor intact. SL appropriate — no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Holding +1.6% just below 52w high 1437.90. Q4 beat (+27% PAT), volume-led growth. Current SL at 1425 is already at breakeven+. No-op MODIFY would be wasted — leaving as HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8% but pulled back today to 407 from 414 high. SL at 407 is essentially at CMP — if it ticks lower it auto-exits with tiny gain. Appropriate trailing — let market decide. Power sector mixed today."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Stock spiked to 1763 then faded to 1746. Organon deal carries leverage concerns flagged by analysts. SL at 1745 = breakeven essentially. Lowering target to 1810 (more achievable) given deal-related uncertainty and potential mean reversion after 9% 2-day move. Same SL — actually keeping target adjustment only is the change here."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, SL at 315 (~1.5% below). Defensive utility, Q4 results May 19. Current SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6%, gave back intraday gains from 473 high to 466. Q4 PAT beat +11%, but JM Financial Reduce target 420 is overhang. SL at 461 (~1.2% below) appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY at 443 still working — stock now at 460, well above limit, will not fill. Cluster risk: already hold NTPC + POWERGRID in power. Adding 3rd power name would breach correlated-cluster discipline. Letting the 443 limit stand (will likely expire) — no new order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1025 to 1030 to protect ~4.7% gain on +5.8% position. Stock extended; momentum strong but risk-reward favors locking in."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL appropriate; holding for geopolitical hedge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (1425 vs entry 1412.94). Let target run to 1465."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 407 is already trailing tight. If broken, tiny profit/breakeven exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1745 is breakeven+. Target trim to 1810 reflects post-deal volatility risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive utility, SL appropriate ahead of May 19 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Faded from intraday high; SL at 461 well-placed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GLENMARK (breakout to ATH 2418 with strong Q3 +15.88%, 3 US launches) and NAM-INDIA (Q4 +29% PAT, +20% upside to consensus 1150) are highest-quality fresh setups but book is already 45% deployed with weak 5-day P&L (14% win rate). Holding fire. RELIANCE near support 1377 with consensus 1716 target — watch for base building. TATACHEM and JSWENERGY skipped (Q3 loss, Q4 PBT loss respectively). RKFORGE high P/E 40, off 30% from highs — speculative. Power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID held) — no more adds.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cash 55%, deployed 45%. 5-day profit factor 0.4x is a red flag — discipline mode. Existing OPEN orders: PHARMABEES 23.65, HINDZINC 612, TATAPOWER 443 are all stale limits unlikely to fill (especially TATAPOWER at 460 vs limit 443). Considering whether to cancel TATAPOWER limit explicitly given cluster risk — leaving for now since limit is far below market and effectively dormant. Daily P&L flat (+0.03%); priority is preserving capital and letting existing winners (PNBHOUSING +5.8%) trail. NO new BUY decisions today — discipline over activity."
}
